name: english-learning-app
description: 本地优先的个人英语网页生词学习 App。

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html styles.css app.js manifest.webmanifest service-worker.js app-icon.svg dist/
scripts.sync: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.android:apk: npm run build && cap copy android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
